languages.python:
import sys
chunk = 'A' * 1024
for _ in range(2 * 1024 * 1024):
    sys.stdout.write(chunk)
languages.javascript:
const chunk = 'A'.repeat(1024);
for (let i = 0; i < 2 * 1024 * 1024; i++) { process.stdout.write(chunk); }
languages.typescript:

using System;
class Program { static void Main() { string c = new string('A', 1024); for (int i = 0; i < 2*1024*1024; i++) Console.Write(c); } }
